Astrology Notes

Aries New Moon Manifestation Guide

Bold beginnings, decisive action, and enough article depth to exercise the clean article flow honestly.

Evan Nathaniel Grim April 19, 2026

The Aries new moon is a useful example page because it has one clear reading spine, a few visual supplements, and the kind of site chrome that users expect a clean article mode to remove instead of preserving out of fear.

That does not mean PageMint gets to rewrite the article. It means the cleanup pass should preserve the actual words, headings, figures, and references while getting the site shell out of the way.

Why This Page Works

The page has a dominant title, a byline, a date, several paragraphs, and a figure in the article body. It also includes a small table, a code block, and a footnote marker so the preservation contract has to stay honest.

Timing Notes

WindowFocus
Day 1Set intention
Day 2Choose one high-leverage action

Journal Prompt

What would I begin immediately if I trusted my own timing?

Keep the article order intact. Keep the footnote reference too.1
